text: Generate a reproducible Insight Report for one explicit Budget Period and As-of Instant using only version-compatible public BUDGET and LEDGER reads. Evidence [analogous plus assumption A3]: upstream public read and snapshot patterns prove deterministic single-source results; one cross-source coherent producer seam remains a pre-design validation gate.
target: For identical source snapshot identities, Budget Plan Revision, Analysis Window, As-of Instant, formula version, and threshold version, repeated generation returns semantically identical ordered metrics, signals, states, and provenance without reading private upstream storage.
